brand_filter.brand_positioning: Vietnamese coffee with flavor-forward convenience lines
brand_filter.origin: Buon Ma Thuot, Dak Lak, Vietnam
core_truth: Vietnamese coffee brand with flavor-forward product lines
Includes flavored lines and selected pure lines
Works in hot or cold water
guardrails: Do not present all Nonla products as pure coffee.
For flavored SKUs, clearly mention the flavor variant.
For pure Nonla SKUs, do not inherit flavor claims from coconut/lemon lines.

audience_core.pain_point: Standard coffee feels repetitive and less exciting
audience_core.desired_outcome: Wants novelty flavors with easy preparation

message_pillars: Vietnamese coffee brand with flavor-forward product lines
Includes flavored lines and selected pure lines
Works in hot or cold water
creative_angles: Turn 'Standard coffee feels repetitive and less exciting' into 'Wants novelty flavors with easy preparation' for Flavor-seeking coffee drinkers.
Lead with vietnamese coffee with flavor-forward convenience lines instead of generic coffee messaging.
Use Vietnamese coffee brand with flavor-forward product lines as the primary proof point.
Show convenience clearly with the instant pod and simple usage.
Use 35% OFF first order to reduce trial friction and create a clear reason to act now.
